titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Philip Taietz papers, 1962-2000.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Philip Taietz Papers, 1962-2000.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2009 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Includes Taietz's publications and results of a 1993 survey "Factors Associated with Continued Professional Productivity of Emeritus Professors at Cornell University" and a 1998 study "Post-Retirement Productivity and Life Quality of Emeritus Professors."

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes Taietz's publications and results of a 1993 survey "Factors Associated with Continued Professional Productivity of Emeritus Professors at Cornell University" and a 1998 study "Post-Retirement Productivity and Life Quality of Emeritus Professors."

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences.Dept. of Rural Sociology

did.unittitle: Emeritus Professors contacted in study "Factors Associated with Continued Professional Effectiveness in Emeritus Professors at Cornell"

Survey of Cornell Emeriti Who Have Moved From Ithaca #101-122
Survey of Cornell Emeriti Who Have Moved From Ithaca #126-145
Survey of Cornell Emeriti Who Have Moved From Ithaca #146-166
Survey of Cornell Emeriti Who Have Moved From Ithaca #167-190
Survey of Cornell Emeriti Who Have Moved From Ithaca #193-208
Survey of Cornell Emeriti Who Have Moved From Ithaca #207-305
Material from study "Post-Retirement Productivity and Life Quality of Emeritus Professors"

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Philip Taietz papers, #21-33-3727. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
